<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  val connected_page :
    ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?predicate:(Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b -> bool Lwt.t) ->
    ?fallback:(Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b -> exn -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
    (Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
    'a -> 'b -> Html_types.html Eliom.Content.Html.elt Lwt.t
end >>
